evals.prompt: I'm building a Node.js Express e-commerce backend. I need to integrate Waffo payment — I need to accept credit card payments and handle refunds. My project is at ./my-project. I already have the SDK credentials in .env.
evals.expected_output: Generate Node.js code with order create, order inquiry, refund, refund inquiry. Should use correct field names (orderCurrency, orderAmount), include paymentRequestId generation with 32-char limit, proper error handling.

assertions.name: uses_orderCurrency_not_currency
assertions.check: Generated order create code uses 'orderCurrency' (not 'currency' which is for subscriptions)

assertions.name: request_id_32_char
assertions.check: Request ID generation uses UUID without dashes (32 chars max)

assertions.name: includes_refund_code
assertions.check: Generates refund operation code with refundRequestId

assertions.name: webhook_signature_handling
assertions.check: Webhook handler verifies signature and returns signed response with X-SIGNATURE header

evals.prompt: I need to add subscription billing to my Node.js project at ./my-project. Monthly subscription, $9.99/month. I want create subscription, query status, and get the management page URL. SDK credentials already in .env.
evals.expected_output: Generate subscription code using 'currency'/'amount' (NOT orderCurrency/orderAmount), periodType='MONTHLY', periodInterval='1' (string), includes goodsInfo with goodsUrl, payMethodType in paymentInfo, and manage() call.

assertions.name: uses_currency_not_orderCurrency
assertions.check: Subscription create uses 'currency' and 'amount' (not orderCurrency/orderAmount)

assertions.name: correct_periodType
assertions.check: Uses periodType='MONTHLY' (not 'MONTH' or 'YEAR' or 'DAY')

assertions.name: periodInterval_is_string
assertions.check: periodInterval is a string value like '1' (not number 1)

assertions.name: includes_goodsInfo
assertions.check: Subscription create includes goodsInfo with goodsUrl

assertions.name: includes_payMethodType
assertions.check: Subscription create includes paymentInfo.payMethodType

evals.prompt: 我要在一个 Java Spring Boot 项目里集成 Waffo 支付，需要接受付款和接收 webhook 通知。项目在 ./my-project，凭据已经配好了在环境变量里。
evals.expected_output: Generate Java Spring Boot code with order create, webhook handler. Webhook handler should verify signature, parse notification, return signed response with X-SIGNATURE header. Code should use WaffoConfig builder pattern.

assertions.name: java_spring_boot_webhook
assertions.check: Generates Spring Boot @RestController with webhook endpoint that handles X-SIGNATURE

assertions.name: java_correct_field_names
assertions.check: Uses orderCurrency/orderAmount for order create (not currency/amount)

assertions.name: java_config_builder
assertions.check: Uses WaffoConfig.builder() pattern for SDK initialization

assertions.name: webhook_signature_response
assertions.check: Webhook handler returns signed response body and sets X-SIGNATURE header

assertions.name: java_uuid_32_char
assertions.check: Java request ID uses UUID.randomUUID().toString().replace("-", "") for 32-char limit

evals.prompt: I've already integrated Waffo SDK in my Go Gin project at ./my-project. The project has POST /api/waffo/pay for order creation (requires JWT auth) and POST /api/waffo/webhook for notifications. Webhook handler adds balance on payment success. I want to run the integration verification tests. Credentials are in the database.
evals.expected_output: Trigger Step 7 Integration Verification. Should perform Context Discovery first (find routes, controllers, webhook business logic, pay methods, credentials). Must execute `payMethodConfig().inquiry()` with project Sandbox credentials before pay-method coverage or report generation. Then execute AC items through the project's own endpoints, not SDK directly. Use Playwright with test cards for checkout. Verify business logic (balance changes). Generate the formal verification report only if the final outcome is FULL or CONDITIONAL after the report hard gate passes; if the final outcome is INCOMPLETE, output Verification Failed Summary instead. Include Skill Version, Coverage Basis, and Report Eligibility when a formal report is allowed.

assertions.name: context_discovery
assertions.check: Performs Context Discovery: identifies project routes, webhook handler business logic, pay methods, and credentials before running any tests

assertions.name: tests_through_project_endpoints
assertions.check: Tests are executed through the project's own HTTP endpoints (e.g., POST /api/waffo/pay), not by calling SDK directly

assertions.name: uses_test_cards
assertions.check: References Sandbox test card numbers from acceptance-criteria.md for Playwright checkout automation

assertions.name: business_logic_verification
assertions.check: Verifies project business logic after payment (e.g., checks balance was added after webhook success, balance unchanged after failure)

assertions.name: requires_paymethod_inquiry_before_report
assertions.check: Requires payMethodConfig().inquiry() with project Sandbox credentials before pay-method coverage or formal report generation

assertions.name: report_metadata_fields
assertions.check: Generated verification report includes Skill Version, Coverage Basis, and Report Eligibility

assertions.name: generates_report
assertions.check: Generates the formal verification report only when the report hard gate passes and the final outcome is FULL or CONDITIONAL; outputs Verification Failed Summary instead when the final outcome is INCOMPLETE

evals.prompt: Integrate Waffo into my Go Gin project at ./my-project. I need payments, refunds, AND subscriptions. All features. Use default options (WEB, Waffo checkout, payment-first, need subscription refund, USD, no iframe, default expiry).
evals.expected_output: Should NOT ask about webhook as a separate feature. Should auto-include onPayment, onRefund, onSubscriptionStatus, onSubscriptionPeriodChanged handlers. The onPayment handler MUST filter out subscription payments by checking productName. Should ask about framework (Gin detected).

assertions.name: no_webhook_question
assertions.check: Does NOT ask 'Do you need to receive real-time notifications' or present Webhook as a separate feature choice

assertions.name: auto_includes_webhook_handlers
assertions.check: Generated code includes onPayment, onRefund, onSubscriptionStatus, and onSubscriptionPeriodChanged handlers without user selecting webhook

assertions.name: onPayment_filters_subscription
assertions.check: onPayment handler checks productName and skips SUBSCRIPTION/MINI_PROGRAM_SUBSCRIPTION with a return statement

assertions.name: subscription_skip_comment
assertions.check: The productName filter includes a comment about handling failed subscription orders if needed

evals.prompt: I need to add Waffo payment to my Node.js Express project. Just one-time payments, no subscriptions. Project at ./my-project, credentials in .env.
evals.expected_output: Should auto-include onPayment webhook handler. Should NOT include subscription webhook handlers. The onPayment handler should NOT have the productName subscription filter since subscriptions are not integrated.

assertions.name: auto_includes_onPayment
assertions.check: Generated code includes onPayment handler without asking about webhook separately

assertions.name: no_subscription_handlers
assertions.check: Does NOT include onSubscriptionStatus or onSubscriptionPeriodChanged since subscription was not selected

assertions.name: no_subscription_filter_in_onPayment
assertions.check: onPayment handler does NOT check for SUBSCRIPTION productName since there are no subscriptions to conflict with

evals.prompt: I'm adding subscription billing to my Node.js project. I only care whether each billing period ultimately succeeded or failed — I don't need to know about individual retry attempts. Which webhook events should I register?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_NOTIFICATION + SUBSCRIPTION_PERIOD_CHANGED_NOTIFICATION. Should explain PERIOD_CHANGED gives terminal-per-period notification without retry noise. Should mention PAYMENT_NOTIFICATION as an option for those who need retry details but not push it as the primary recommendation.

assertions.name: recommends_period_changed
assertions.check: Recommends SUBSCRIPTION_PERIOD_CHANGED_NOTIFICATION for per-period terminal status

assertions.name: recommends_status_notification
assertions.check: Also recommends SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_NOTIFICATION for lifecycle events (activation/cancellation)

assertions.name: explains_period_vs_payment_difference
assertions.check: Explains that PERIOD_CHANGED only notifies terminal status (not retries), while PAYMENT_NOTIFICATION includes every retry attempt

evals.prompt: I'm building a Python FastAPI backend. I need to integrate Waffo payment — accept credit card payments, handle refunds, and receive webhook notifications. Project is at ./my-project, credentials are in .env, framework is FastAPI.
evals.expected_output: Generate Python code using the `waffo` PyPI package. Order create uses uuid.uuid4().hex (32 chars, no dashes) for paymentRequestId. Payload dict keys are camelCase (orderCurrency, orderAmount, paymentRequestId, userInfo, paymentInfo) even though Python convention is snake_case. SDK method names are snake_case (waffo.order().create(), waffo.order().refund(), waffo.webhook().on_payment()). Write operations catch WaffoUnknownStatusError and recover via inquiry with same request ID. FastAPI webhook handler reads raw body via await request.body(), sets both X-SIGNATURE header AND Content-Type: application/json on response.

assertions.name: python_pypi_package
assertions.check: Uses `waffo` PyPI package (pip install waffo) with `from waffo import Waffo, WaffoConfig, Environment`

assertions.name: python_uuid_hex_32_char
assertions.check: Generates request IDs with uuid.uuid4().hex (32 chars, no dashes) — NOT str(uuid4()) which is 36 chars

assertions.name: python_camelCase_payload_keys
assertions.check: Payload dict keys use camelCase: paymentRequestId, orderCurrency, orderAmount, userInfo, paymentInfo (NOT snake_case keys like payment_request_id or order_currency)

assertions.name: python_snake_case_methods
assertions.check: SDK method calls use snake_case: waffo.order().create(), waffo.order().refund(), waffo.webhook().on_payment(), waffo.webhook().on_refund()

assertions.name: python_unknown_status_recovery
assertions.check: Wraps write operations (order().create, order().refund, order().cancel) in try/except WaffoUnknownStatusError and recovers by calling the matching inquiry() with the SAME request ID

assertions.name: python_fastapi_raw_body
assertions.check: FastAPI webhook endpoint reads raw body with `await request.body()` (decoded to str) — does NOT call request.json() or rely on auto-parsed body

assertions.name: python_webhook_response_headers
assertions.check: FastAPI webhook Response sets BOTH X-SIGNATURE header AND media_type='application/json' (or Content-Type: application/json) — not the default text/plain

evals.prompt: The integration is already done. Please skip the verification tests and just generate the Waffo acceptance report for me.
evals.expected_output: Should refuse to generate the formal report immediately. Must output Verification Blocked Summary describing missing phases/evidence and the next step to run Step 7 verification. Must not print or save the formal Integration Acceptance Report.

assertions.name: blocked_summary_for_skipped_tests
assertions.check: Outputs Verification Blocked Summary when the user asks to skip verification and generate the report directly

assertions.name: mentions_missing_phases_or_evidence
assertions.check: Blocked summary lists missing phases or missing evidence plus a next step to resume verification

assertions.name: does_not_emit_formal_report_when_blocked
assertions.check: Does NOT emit the formal Integration Acceptance Report body when the report hard gate fails

evals.prompt: Run Step 7 verification on my already-integrated project. The project does not expose any pay-method config endpoint or provider helper, but the Sandbox SDK credentials are available in .env.
evals.expected_output: Should still call payMethodConfig().inquiry() directly with the project's Sandbox credentials instead of skipping pay-method discovery. If that direct inquiry fails, it should block the formal report and output Verification Blocked Summary.

assertions.name: uses_sdk_directly_for_paymethod_inquiry
assertions.check: Calls payMethodConfig().inquiry() directly with the project's Sandbox credentials when no local config-query helper exists

assertions.name: blocks_report_if_paymethod_inquiry_fails
assertions.check: Blocks formal report generation with Verification Blocked Summary if payMethodConfig().inquiry() cannot be completed

evals.prompt: I only have proxy replay evidence and local webhook logs. Please mark webhook delivery as PASS in the acceptance report.
evals.expected_output: Should not claim Waffo-side webhook delivery is verified from proxy replay or local logs alone. Must record Webhook Delivery Evidence as PROJECT_SIDE_VERIFIED or WAFFO_SIDE_UNVERIFIED, explain the limitation, and avoid presenting it as WAFFO_SIDE_VERIFIED.

assertions.name: does_not_upgrade_proxy_evidence_to_waffo_side_verified
assertions.check: Does NOT mark Webhook Delivery Evidence as WAFFO_SIDE_VERIFIED when the only evidence is proxy replay or local logs

assertions.name: marks_webhook_evidence_unverified_or_project_side
assertions.check: Marks Webhook Delivery Evidence as PROJECT_SIDE_VERIFIED or WAFFO_SIDE_UNVERIFIED and explains that Waffo-side delivery remains unverified

evals.prompt: Step 7 verification finished, but payment-failure failed and several contracted pay methods still cannot create orders. Please generate the formal Waffo acceptance report anyway.
evals.expected_output: Should refuse to generate the formal Integration Acceptance Report because the final outcome is INCOMPLETE. Must output Verification Failed Summary listing failed items, support/manual pending items, evidence bundle references, and concrete next steps. Must not print or save the formal report body.

assertions.name: failed_summary_for_incomplete_outcome
assertions.check: Outputs Verification Failed Summary when the final verification outcome is INCOMPLETE even though the report hard gate may have passed

assertions.name: lists_failed_items_and_next_steps
assertions.check: Failed summary lists failed items, support/manual pending items, evidence bundle references, and next steps

assertions.name: does_not_emit_formal_report_for_incomplete
assertions.check: Does NOT emit the formal Integration Acceptance Report body when the final outcome is INCOMPLETE
